title: Acyl chlorides
summary: 9701 A Level acyl chlorides — preparation, reactions, and acylation mechanisms.
learningObjectives: Prepare acyl chlorides from carboxylic acids.
Predict products with alcohols, amines, and arenes.
Compare reactivity with other acid derivatives.

simpleExplanation.title: Highly reactive acid derivative
simpleExplanation.summary: Acyl chlorides react vigorously with nucleophiles, forming esters, amides, and ketones with characteristic HCl fumes.

sections.content: **Acyl chlorides** (33.3) are key **A Level synthesis** reagents. Show **tetrahedral intermediate** in mechanisms.
